name: Seyed Abbas Araghchi
bio: Seyed Abbas Araghchi has served as Iran's Foreign Minister since August 2024. A career diplomat, he was a key negotiator in the 2015 JCPOA and has led Tehran's response to the 2026 US-Israel-Iran conflict, representing Iran in indirect negotiations with Washington via Pakistani intermediaries.

quotes.text: These satellite images follow the usual pattern — they are Israeli-driven fabrications aimed at disrupting the negotiations with the United States at a critical moment.
